sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92640" key="r(oqio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥοθ-ιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n92640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impetuosity, vehemence</tr_>, of language, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
